prestazioni: 12A-REW rotary engine (early peripheral-port variant) with a custom-built Bridgeport Racing billet aluminum rotor housing and reinforced apex seals for 25 psi boost using a Garrett GT35R turbocharger, paired with a custom-built Treadstone TR-FC3S front-mount intercooler and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for sequential fuel injection and ignition timing control

Full custom 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Racing Beat with a 3.5-inch diameter MagnaFlow stainless steel exhaust system featuring a straight-pipe design and a custom-built Racing Beat thermal reactor for emissions compliance in vintage racing classes

Custom-built 5-speed close-ratio transmission with a Mazda RX-7 FC3S gearset (1st: 3.307, 2nd: 2.062, 3rd: 1.370, 4th: 1.000, 5th: 0.821) and a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch with a billet aluminum flywheel, paired with a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (40% lock) for optimal power transfer
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (RX-3 specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P 15x9.5 +15 front and 15x11 +20 rear wheels wrapped in Toyo R888R 225/50R15 and 295/40R15 tires

Custom carbon fiber hood with a functional NACA duct for intercooler cooling, paired with a custom-built Mazdaspeed-style rear spoiler and a set of custom LED taillights by Jun Auto Style, featuring sequential turn signals and a smoked lens finish

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (RX-3 specific mounting brackets), a custom-built Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a full custom roll cage by Hard Dog Motorsports with integrated harness bars for 6-point Schroth Racing harnesses
